Stop 1 · June 4–8
Paris 🗼
5 days in the City of Light · Apartment stay
Paris
✈️
Wednesday, June 3
Wheels Up from Denver
The adventure begins! Flying Denver → Paris CDG. Long flight but the croissants at the other end are worth it.
✈️ Travel Day
🗼
Thursday, June 4
Arrive in Paris — Bonjour!
Land at CDG, get settled into the apartment, and soak it all in. First evening — wander the neighborhood, find a café, and order everything.
🏡 Check In 🥐 Explore
🏠 Paris Apartment →
👑
Friday, June 5
Versailles
11:30am tickets for the Palace of Versailles — the Hall of Mirrors, the gardens, the sheer over-the-top grandeur of it all. Pure royalty energy.
🏰 Palace of Versailles 11:30am Tickets
2 adults · 4 youth tickets
🎨
Saturday, June 6
Wander Paris
A classic Paris day — Montmartre and Sacré-Cœur in the morning, the Eiffel Tower, then over to Notre Dame (nearly fully restored!). No agenda, just wandering.
⛪ Montmartre 🗼 Eiffel Tower ⛩ Notre Dame
🖼
Sunday, June 7
Louvre + Catacombs
Louvre opens at 9am — arrive at 8am to beat the crowds. Mona Lisa, Venus de Milo, and approximately 35,000 other incredible things. Then the Catacombs in the evening — six million people underground.
🖼 Louvre — 9:00am 💀 Catacombs — Evening
Louvre tickets in email · Arrive 8am
✈️
Monday, June 8
Au Revoir Paris → Ciao Napoli!
Flying EasyJet to Naples. A bittersweet goodbye to Paris and hello to Italy — pizza, chaos, and the best espresso of your life await.
✈️ EasyJet to Naples
🎬 Paris Reels
Know these things before you go to PARIS, FRANCE 🇫🇷

Stop 2 · June 8–10
Naples 🍕
3 days in the birthplace of pizza · Apartment stay
Naples
🍕
Monday, June 8
Arrive Naples — Pizza Emergency
Check into the apartment and immediately eat the best pizza you have ever had. That is the entire plan and it is a perfect plan.
🏡 Check In 🍕 First Neapolitan Pizza
🏠 Naples Apartment →
🏛
Tuesday, June 9
Pompeii Day
Take the Circumvesuviana train from Napoli Garibaldi station — aim for the 2pm train at the latest. 3pm guided tour of Pompeii. An actual Roman city frozen in time.
🏛 Pompeii 3pm Tour 🚂 Circumvesuviana Train
Tour booked — Derek has email · Train schedule →
🏖
Wednesday, June 10
Beach Morning → Train to Rome
Morning at the beach before the big move to Rome. Train departs at 5:05pm from Naples — TrenItalia on Derek's Apple Wallet. Don't be late, this one's booked!
🏖 Beach Morning 🚄 5:05pm Train to Rome
🎬 Naples Reels
Naples — City Vibes 🍕

Naples — Food & Culture 🍕

Stop 3 · June 10–14
Rome 🏟
4 days in the Eternal City · Apartment stay
Roma
🏡
Wednesday, June 10
Arrive Rome
Roll in from Naples and get settled into the Rome apartment. Four nights in the Eternal City — there's a lot to eat and see.
🏡 Check In
🏠 Rome Apartment →
⛪
Thursday, June 11
Vatican City
The Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel — Michelangelo's ceiling is genuinely mind-blowing in person. Book early entry to beat the crowds and leave time to wander St. Peter's Basilica.
⛪ Vatican Museums 🎨 Sistine Chapel
🏟
Friday, June 12
Colosseum — and Happy Birthday Kadie! 🎂
9:30am Get Your Guide tour of the Colosseum — gladiators, history, and incredible views. And Kadie turns another year fabulous today! Celebrating in Rome? Not a bad place to be.
🏟 Colosseum 9:30am Get Your Guide — on app
🎂 Happy Birthday Kadie!  Celebrating in Rome — not bad at all! 🥂
🌊
Saturday, June 13
Trevi Fountain + Kaily's Birthday Dinner! 🎂
Trevi Fountain is free after 10pm and magical at night — throw your coin! But more importantly, today Kaily turns 14 and picks the birthday dinner. Her call, full stop.
🌊 Trevi Fountain — after 10pm 🍽 Kaily's Birthday Dinner
🎂 Happy 14th Birthday Kaily!  Also the day Taylor Swift gets married. Pretty legendary birthday. 💛✨
🚄
Sunday, June 14
Arrivederci Roma → Venice!
Frecciarossa departs at 10:45am — Italy's high-speed train, very smooth, very fast. A couple of hours and you'll be pulling into Venice Santa Lucia.
🚄 10:45am Frecciarossa to Venice
Tickets in Derek's Apple Wallet
🎬 Rome Reels

Stop 4 · June 14–17
Venice 🚤
3 days in the floating city · Staying on the Lido island
Venezia
🚤
Sunday, June 14
Arrive Venice — Welcome to the Lagoon
Arriving at Santa Lucia station is a jaw-drop moment — you step outside and there's the Grand Canal. Take the vaporetto to Lido, check into the place, and breathe.
🏡 Check In — Lido 🚤 Vaporetto to Lido
🏠 Lido Place →
🏖
Monday, June 15
Lido Beach Day
The Lido has one of Venice's best beaches — wide, sandy, and way less crowded than the main island. A proper beach day while technically being in Venice. That's the move.
🏖 Lido Beach 🍦 Gelato on the Beach
🌊
Tuesday, June 16
Venice Day — Explore the City
Take the vaporetto into Venice proper — get lost in the alleys, cross every bridge, find a bacaro for cicchetti and wine, visit Rialto Market, and consider a gondola. TBD activity — add your ideas below!
🌊 Explore Venice 🥂 Bacaro & Cicchetti 🌉 Rialto Bridge
✈️
Wednesday, June 17
Homeward Bound
Venice to Denver. Say goodbye to the lagoon, pack your bags full of things you shouldn't have bought, and head home with two weeks of memories.
✈️ Venice → Denver
🎬 Venice Reels
